name: Upgrade Triple Cash Rewards Visa

welcome_offer.description: $200 bonus when you also open a Rewards Checking Preferred account and make 3 debit card transactions. Requires opening Upgrade Rewards Checking Preferred.

earning_rates.category: Home purchases (furniture, appliances, home improvement, etc.)
earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 3% cash back on home category

earning_rates.category: Auto purchases (car washes, auto parts, service, etc.)
earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 3% cash back on auto category

earning_rates.category: Health purchases (doctor visits, pharmacy, gym, etc.)
earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 3% cash back on health category
Unlimited 1% cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Credit/loan hybrid
other_benefits.description: Like other Upgrade cards, functions as both credit card and installment loan — remaining balance converts to fixed-rate repayment in equal monthly installments

other_benefits.name: Upgrade Shopping discounts
other_benefits.description: Additional discounts available through Upgrade Shopping portal

notes: Upgrade Triple Cash Rewards earns 3% on home, auto, and health categories — unusual category combinations that cover everyday spending areas. $200 welcome bonus requires opening a Rewards Checking Preferred account. APR: 14.99%–29.99% variable. Balance transfer fee: up to 5%. Credit lines range $500–$25,000. Card acts as a hybrid credit card/installment loan — any remaining balance can be converted to fixed monthly payments at a fixed rate. No cash withdrawal at ATMs.
